'--help' was not matched. Did you mean '--key', or '--dead'?
Usage:
  message-manager delete [options]

Options:
  -g, --resource-group <RESOURCE-GROUP>    Name of resource group.
  -t, --type <TYPE>                        Queue or Topic.
  --primaryKey <PRIMARYKEY>                Use primary or secondary key
  --namespace-name <NAMESPACE-NAME>        servicebus namespace name
  --keyName <KEYNAME>                      Name of access policy
  --key <KEY>                              SharedAccessKey
  --topic-name <TOPIC-NAME>                servicebus topic name
  --queue-name <QUEUE-NAME>                servicebus queue name
  --name <NAME>                            servicebus subscription name
  --dead <DEAD>                            use deadletter queue
  --id <ID>                                message id
  --force <FORCE>                          force delete all
